items.title: Andrew Yang thinks the next big startup opportunity is lowering the cost of living
items.summary: Andrew Yang made a list of everything Americans overpay for — housing, food, wireless — and thinks the next startup gold rush is giving that money back.

items.title: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
items.summary: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.

items.title: SpaceX IPO: Live updates on everything you need to know
items.summary: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and...

items.title: Meta’s months-old AI unit is a soul-crushing gulag, say the engineers stuck inside it
items.summary: A new report suggests the unit, which employs 6,500 people, is on the verge of revolt.

items.title: Chinese cybercrime operation that used AI to scam ‘hundreds of thousands of victims’ sued by Google
items.summary: The tech giant said a group called "Outsider Enterprise" used AI to scam hundreds of thousands of victims, sending 2.5 million text messages over a span of two weeks.

items.title: Mistral is rumored to be raising €3B at €20B valuation
items.summary: The funding round would value the company at around €20 billion (about $23.15 billion), nearly double its Series C valuation of €11.7 billion.

items.title: SpaceX, Anthropic, and OpenAI’s hot IPO summer
items.summary: The IPO market is back, and it’s not the same companies leading the charge. FAANG had a good run, but a new acronym is taking over: MANGOS — Meta (or Microsoft, depending on who you ask), Anthropic, Nvidia, Google, OpenAI, and SpaceX. Ha...

items.title: olmo-eval: An evaluation workbench for the model development loop
items.summary: olmo-eval: An evaluation workbench for the model development loop

items.title: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
items.summary: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.

items.title: Cheaper, faster, and culturally aware, Avataar’s video AI is built for India’s scale
items.summary: Avataar AI's distilled video model is priced at $0.005 for every second of generation.
